  3. The teacher gave him a lead for the assignment.

  4. She used a lead to mark the stone.
options: The pipes were made of lead.
He will lead the team to victory.
The teacher gave him a lead for the assignment.
She used a lead to mark the stone.
subject: English

questionHtml:
Select the option which contains the most appropriate HOMONYM of the word given in bold/underline.
The pall was drawn over the casket before the final hymn.

  1. The mourners adjusted the silk pall carefully during the rite.

  2. The craftsman embroidered the pall with golden thread.

  3. The evening gloom cast a pall over the once-cheerful village.

  4. The bishop blessed the ceremonial pall before Mass.
options: The mourners adjusted the silk pall carefully during the rite.
The craftsman embroidered the pall with golden thread.
The evening gloom cast a pall over the once-cheerful village.
The bishop blessed the ceremonial pall before Mass.

  2. I received your letter even though it had an incomplete address.

  3. The Prime Minister will address the youth at the national conference tomorrow.

  4. The manager confirmed that the letter was sent to the right address.
